mapper.select: SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY default_address DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND default_address = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO addresses (user_id, receiver, phone, province, city, district, detail, default_address) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiver}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{defaultAddress})
mapper.update: UPDATE addresses SET receiver = #{receiver}, phone = #{phone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail = #{detail}, default_address = #{defaultAddress} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE addresses SET default_address = FALSE WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM addresses WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
